_comment: AFlix remote config — host this file on GitHub at a public raw URL. The HTML never contains your API key.

servers._comment: Direct Stream — no iframe, no ads. Tries vidsrc.rip → vidsrc.xyz API → FlixHQ in sequence. First working source wins.
servers.name: Direct Stream

_direct_stream_note: The 'direct' server uses the DIRECT_PROVIDERS waterfall in the app JS: it tries vidsrc.rip JSON API first (fastest), then vidsrc.xyz via CORS proxy, then FlixHQ/consumet last. All three return a bare .m3u8 URL played in AFlix's own <video> element — no iframe page, no popup ads. If all three fail it auto-falls back to the next iframe server.
_consumet_note: FlixHQ uses the consumet API for direct HLS streams — zero ads, zero iframes. Self-host at https://github.com/consumet/api.consumet.org and update _api above, or use a public instance (may be slow/intermittent).
